text:
Fossilized Deodorosaurus Dropping (, Deodorozaurusu no Fun no Kaseki) is fossilized fecalmatter from a Deodorosaurus and it is an item up for auction in the Southernpiece Auction. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Plot

Greed Island arc

The Fossilized Deodorosaurus Dropping is the first item up for auction in the Southernpiece Auction. 

Trivia

The Fossilized Deodorosaurus Dropping does not appear or is mentioned whatsoever in the 2011 anime adaptation.
